title: Sardine Poke Bowl
description: A fusion of Japanese and Mediterranean flavors, this recipe combines the richness of sardines with the freshness of poke. Perfect for a light lunch or dinner.

ingredients.name: Sardines in water
ingredients.notes: Look for sardines that are low in mercury

ingredients.name: Poke mix (soy sauce, sugar, sesame oil, etc.)
Silky sesame seeds
ingredients.notes: Adds nutty flavor and crunchy texture

instructions: Drain the sardines and flake them into a medium-sized bowl.
Whisk together the poke mix, sardine oil, rice vinegar, and sesame oil in a small bowl.
Add the whisked mixture to the sardines and toss to coat.
Sprinkle the sesame seeds, grated ginger, and chopped green onions over the top.
Taste and adjust the seasoning as needed.
Drizzle with sesame oil and serve immediately.
